title: Tab List
description: Mod to customize the player tab list
body:
# 🌿Tab List
### ❓A mod that lets you customize the tab list  
⚙️The configuration file is located at ```config/tablist-common.toml```

🔥To run the mod, you need [spark](https://modrinth.com/mod/spark) and Java 21+

![example](https://i.imgur.com/2uhugBq.png)

❗If you want me to port the mod to a certain version of the game, feel free to write on the discord server
